title: signature: docker: fix govet in sprintf
body:
```
go vet ./...
signature/docker.go:51: wrong number of args for format in Sprintf call: 1 needed but 2 args
```

I don't know how this went past the go vet check

Signed-off-by: Antonio Murdaca runcom@redhat.com

comments.body:
ACK. Should I still be merging this into skopeo? Can we somehow move the PR to the other repo? If not, could you clone it manually?

> I don't know how this went past the go vet check

This is not the first time something like this has happened. I am fairly sure that the `hack/*` logic for only validating updated files is somewhat broken, but I haven’t looked into this in detail.
I'll move this right there in the new repo
@mtrmac moved there - I'll merge it in the other repo
